## Step 2: Make Prediction - Compilation Error

The `Item` type and `surchargeForItem` only consider `cursed`, not `enchantment`. The test code itself compiles (it just passes a new field on the literal). Since `runScenario(scenario: any)` accepts anything, there will likely be NO compilation error. Instead, this will go straight to a runtime assertion error.

Red Phase - Compilation Error Prediction:
- Test: "should add 30% high-enchantment surcharge for an item with enchantment >= 5"
- Expected: No compilation error (runScenario accepts `any`, Item already has loose structure)
- Reason: Types are permissive; the new field doesn't break compilation
- Error: None expected
